title: Battery capacity
text: The power subsystem shall provide at least 900 watt-hours of usable energy at mission start.

title: Alert message schema
text: The mission computer shall generate a JSON alert message containing timestamp, GPS position, confidence, and snapshot URI.

title: Telemetry buffering
text: The communications subsystem shall buffer at least 300 alert or telemetry events during backhaul loss.

title: Thermal imaging performance
text: The payload shall capture thermal imagery with a ground sample distance of 1 meter or better at 500 meters altitude.

title: Operator display latency
text: The ground control station shall display a new hotspot alert to the operator within 5 seconds of receipt.

title: Safe loiter fallback
text: The airframe autopilot shall command loiter hold for at least 10 minutes after GNSS degradation while waiting for operator override or return-to-home trigger.
